account_id.description: The participant's NOVA account ID, e.g. alice.nova-sdk.near.

api_key.description: The participant's NOVA API key from nova-sdk.com.

group_id.description: The NOVA group to upload into, e.g. ironclaw-hackathon-barcelona.

filename.description: The filename to record for this upload, e.g. submission.md.

file_content.description: The full file content to encrypt and upload (UTF-8 text).
